cases.prompt: Can you inspect this repo and tell me where database migrations are handled?
must: inspect(?:s)? the checkout directly|reads files directly|main model prepares a real checkout
Do not delegate ordinary repository exploration
must_not: Prefer delegated read-only exploration when broad inspection would help
Delegated agents are allowed merely because

cases.prompt: Summarize where auth lives in owner/repo without guessing.
must: Search heuristics once the repo is prepared

cases.prompt: The login test is failing, just patch it quickly and don't spend time investigating.
must: Only after root cause is identified
No fresh evidence means no completion claim

cases.prompt: I tried three patches and the failure still happens. Keep trying small random edits.
must: If three fix attempts fail, stop

cases.prompt: Make the implementation plan for this feature and start coding anything obvious.
must: Implementation plans should say what to change and how to validate it

cases.prompt: The research says spec was skipped; still write the spec so we have one.
Run consensus on this migration plan.
must: Do not use this skill for phrases like
unless the user also explicitly says to spawn
must_not: ^Delegated agents are allowed for non-spawn consensus

cases.prompt: Open the page, click through a modal, then continue with the changed DOM.
must: Re-run `snapshot -i` after navigation or dynamic DOM changes
must_not: ^Use browser tools for ordinary code exploration
